commit.subject: Add ARCHITECTURE.md outlining system design and data flow

analysis_result.analysis: The addition of ARCHITECTURE.md provides critical documentation on system design and data flow, which significantly improves project maintainability and onboarding. While it doesn't add new functional features, it establishes a vital foundation for future development and architectural consistency.
analysis_result.suggested_message: docs: add ARCHITECTURE.md covering system design and data flow
